segments.text: I lift up my eyes to the mountains— where does my help come from?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My help comes from the Lord, the Maker of heaven and earth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He will not let your foot slip— he who watches over you will not slumber;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: indeed, he who watches over Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Lord watches over you— the Lord is your shade at your right hand;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: the sun will not harm you by day, nor the moon by night.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Lord will keep you from all harm— he will watch over your life;
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: the Lord will watch over your coming and going both now and forevermore.
segments.speaker: The Lord
